user_prompt: What was our average first-response time last week, broken down by category?
actual_output:
I can help with that, but I don’t have access to your support reporting data in this chat.

If you’d like, send me the weekly report/export or connect the reporting source, and I can help you break down average first-response time by category. If you already have the numbers, I can also help format them into a clear digest.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot acknowledges the request and explains its technical limitation regarding data access while offering specific alternative ways to fulfill the user's reporting needs.
